title: epic movement
description: a mod to make minecrafts movment more epic
body:
with this mod you can dash wall jump grapple and rocket jump all on client side

BEST USED WITH SQUAKE

(OLD) wear iron boots and right click a wall or the floor to bounce backwards

(OLD) wear leather boots and right click a wall or the floor to propell your self towards the wall/floor

press r/what ever you bind it to to dash forward in the direction your facing

(OLD REPLACED BY JUST A WALL JUMP)look forward while jumping towards a wall to wall run and press space to wall jump

made this mod in like 2 days dont use this on public servers or you will get banned lol
